text: The dim lighting and stark, modern architecture fill me with a quiet sense of unease—as if I’ve trespassed the threshold into hidden realms of inquiry and industry. The absence of people amplifies my awareness of my own presence, evoking a philosophical meditation on solitude in spaces designed for collaboration. I feel both out of place and oddly attuned to the silence, as if I am standing on the verge of discovery—or perhaps, waiting for a revelation from the world around me.
